validation_method: code-based inventory scan + controlled staging required before activation
recommended_testing: Phase 1: isolated staging HERMES_HOME per skill, parse syntax only.
Phase 2: smoke-test canonical priority skills in actual session.
Phase 3: gateway/telegram separate gating; only run one poller per bot token.
Railway: validate /health, docker startup, env vars, volumes before activating gateway skills.
rejected_categories: Offensive/war-category skills remain disabled and uninstalled per LCC doctrine.
